name: seosanch-cell
description: Cloudflare Pages cell member care manager.

scripts.deploy: npm run prepare:deploy && npx wrangler pages deploy .deploy-public --project-name seosanch-cell
scripts.types:notifications: npx wrangler types --config wrangler.notifications.jsonc --env-interface CallNotePushEnv --include-runtime false worker-configuration.notifications.d.ts
scripts.check: node --check public/app.js && node --check public/auth.js && node --check lib/webauthn.js && node --check lib/login-rate-limit.js && node --check lib/notification-crypto.js && node --check lib/call-note-notification-api.js && node --check workers/call-note-push/index.js && node --check functions/_middleware.js && node --check functions/api/[[path]].js
